---
title: "Final Project"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
recent_grads <- read_csv("data/recent-grads.csv")

jobs <- recent_grads |>
  select( -Major_code, -Sample_size, - Full_time_year_round)|>
  rename(median_earnings = Median,
         college_req = College_jobs,
         no_college_req = Non_college_jobs,
         earnings_rank = Rank)
```
